_comment: Cross-language contract for BootstrapErrorCode — the `error` wire string in the bootstrap/onboarding CBOR/JSON error envelope that soyeht-ios decodes as BootstrapError.serverError(code). theyos (household-rs) owns the wire set; soyeht-ios vendors this VERBATIM via scripts/sync-cross-repo-fixtures.sh and validates its BootstrapErrorCode enum + fail-soft decode against it. `http_status` documents the HTTP status each code is emitted with (unchanged by the producer-typing PR). `Unknown` is RECEIVE-ONLY (fail-soft) and is NOT a producer code, so it is not listed. The pair-machine `StageError` codes (no_transport_address, stage_failed) are a separate taxonomy and are intentionally excluded.
